prompts:
In `components/onboarding.tsx`, modify the **Activity step** (around line 1607) to hide the 'Continue' CTA until the user has selected an activity level, then reveal it with an animation. Current pattern: ```jsx
Continue with this activity
``` New pattern: Replace with a hidden-until-selected reveal. Wrap the CTA in a div that transitions from `max-h-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden` to `max-h-[72px] opacity-100` using `transition-all duration-200` — conditioned on `!!selectedActivityLevel`. Remove the disabled state and the muted/disabled className branch entirely. Update the CTA label to `Continue — {selectedLabel} →` where selectedLabel comes from `activityLevels.find(l => l.id === selectedActivityLevel)?.label`. The `OnboardingPrimaryCta` should always use `bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90` (no disabled state needed since it's hidden when nothing selected). Do NOT change anything else in the activity step. Do NOT change the `activityOptionButtonClass` function or how activity cards render. Verify: `npm run build` passes.

In `components/onboarding.tsx`, modify the **Goal step** (around line 1683) to hide the 'Continue' CTA until the user has selected a goal, then reveal it with an animation — same pattern as the activity step. Current pattern: ```jsx
Continue with this goal
``` New pattern: Wrap the CTA in a div with `transition-all duration-200` and classes `max-h-0 opacity-0 overflow-hidden` when `!selectedGoal`, and `max-h-[72px] opacity-100` when `!!selectedGoal`. Remove the disabled state. Update CTA label to `Continue — {goalLabel} →` where goalLabel comes from `goals.find(g => g.id === selectedGoal)?.label`. CTA className is always `bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90`. Do NOT change the goal card rendering or `goalOptionButtonClass`. Verify: `npm run build` passes.

In `components/onboarding.tsx`, apply the same hide-until-selected CTA reveal pattern to three more steps:

**1. Remove the disabled prop. Update CTA label to `Continue — {dietLabel} →` where dietLabel = `dietTypes.find(d => d.id === selectedDietType)?.label`. Note: the diet step also has a macroPreview section above the CTA — do NOT touch that section.

**3. Quick-estimate body type** (around line 1510–1526, inside `step === 'quick-estimate' && entryChosen`): The CTA 'Set my targets' is conditioned on `weight && quickHeight && quickAge && quickBodyType`. Wrap its container in an outer div with the same transition pattern — hidden when condition is false, revealed when all four values are truthy. Remove the disabled prop. Keep label 'Set my targets'. Do NOT touch the input fields or the 'I have detailed body stats' link below.
